surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-gray-200), zero shadow. Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-0.5) and border-gray-300 transition-transform duration-200.
surface_strategies.header: Solid background (bg-white) with a hard bottom border (border-gray-200). Sticky top.
surface_strategies.market_status: Capsule shape (rounded-full). Open: bg-accent_green_bg text-accent_green with a pulsating dot. Closed: bg-gray-100 text-gray-600.

components.button_primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002480] hover:text-white px-6 py-2.5 font-medium tracking-tight rounded-sm transition-colors
components.button_secondary: bg-white text-gray-900 border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 px-6 py-2.5 font-medium tracking-tight rounded-sm transition-colors
components.inputs: bg-white border-gray-200 rounded-sm focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/20 focus:border-[#002FA7] text-sm
components.table: w-full text-left border-collapse. th: uppercase, text-xs, font-bold, tracking-[0.1em], text-gray-500, py-3 border-b border-gray-200. td: py-4 border-b border-gray-100 font-mono text-sm
components.badge_positive: bg-[#F0FDF4] text-[#00C853] px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono font-bold rounded-sm border border-[#00C853]/20
components.badge_negative: bg-[#FEF2F2] text-[#FF3B30] px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono font-bold rounded-sm border border-[#FF3B30]/20

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly change color or border on hover.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and links.
motion_and_interactions.data_update: When price updates, flash background briefly (green for up, red for down) using CSS animation.

onboarding_banner_bg.description: Abstract geometric background, swiss design, stark white and subtle grey with a signal red element. Use as background for the Twilio setup/onboarding banner with a bg-white/90 backdrop-blur overlay for readability.

icons.usage: Use sharp, clear icons. 16px or 20px size depending on context. 1.5 stroke width.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Install custom fonts using fontsource: `yarn add @fontsource/cabinet-grotesk @fontsource/satoshi @fontsource/jetbrains-mono` and import in index.css or main entry file.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard layout. Utilize every pixel. Eliminate empty card bottoms by ensuring heights stretch properly.
For the Watchlist, use a dense table or bento grid list where Tickers and Prices utilize the JetBrains Mono font for tabular alignment. Always right-align numeric data columns.
Avoid the default 'Vercel-look'. Remove soft shadows from Shadcn components and apply strict 1px solid borders with 0-4px (rounded-none to rounded-sm) border radius.
The Market Status indicator should be prominently placed in the Header or Top Summary section. Use a pulsing CSS animation for the 'Live' dot when the market is open.
The Twilio onboarding banner must use the provided 'onboarding_banner_bg' image. Add a semi-transparent overlay (e.g., bg-white/90) so text remains completely legible against it.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Data Density: Ensure enough contrast for values. Avoid wrapping numbers. Group related stats closely.
